title: MapReduce Delegation Token Identifier
description: The `DelegationTokenIdentifier` class in Hadoop MapReduce's security/token/delegation directory manages MapReduce-specific delegation tokens. It extends `AbstractDelegationTokenIdentifier`, providing functionality for job submission and tracking. The class defines `MAPREDUCE_DELEGATION_KIND` for token identification, constructing identifiers with owner, renewer, and real user details. It doesn't handle traditional inputs/outputs, instead focusing on secure job submission and tracking. The class depends on Hadoop's classification, IO, and security token delegation packages.
